$comment: c15c shipped <unistd.h> + <sys/mman.h> on macOS — the libSystem linkage + per-format availability witness for the two headers whose values AGREE Linux↔macOS (no value variant; only availableObjectFormats + library diverge). getpagesize (unistd) + munmap (sys/mman) resolve from libSystem and RUN on Apple Silicon. Single arm64-macho target → runs on the macos-latest CI leg. exit 42 iff both symbols link+run and the agreeing constants are present. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop the macho availability → the #includes fail loud on macho. Release arm runs the optimizer over the calls.
